extracted_value: Any participant that reports vision changes during the study should undergo an ophthalmology assessment. Assessment requirements to be discussed with Medical Monitor. Any participant who has symptoms suggestive of Pigmentary Maculophathy on available imaging and has not had an FAF should be sent to a specialist for assessment Pigmentary Maculopathy and an FAF.
